title: ElectroMobsDefense
description: This mod will add an event that will become more complicated and new mobs will be added as you progress.
body:
Adds an event in which you need to survive and pass it. It will get more complicated as you progress. The event is divided into 3 stages. Each one is more difficult than the previous one. In the end, you will receive a very rich reward.

Have fun :D
